title: N-ary Tree Preorder Traversal
metaData:
{
  "name": "preorder",
  "params": [
    {
      "name": "root",
      "type": "integer"
    }
  ],
  "return": {
    "type": "list<integer>"
  },
  "languages": [
    "cpp",

  "manual": true, "typescriptCustomType" : "class _Node {\n    val: number\n    children: _Node[]\n\n    constructor(val?: number, children?: _Node[]) {\n        this.val = (val===undefined ? 0 : val)\n        this.children = (children===undefined ? [] : children)\n    }\n}\n"

}
